productDisplayName: Nike Men Football Soccer Red Jacket
description: Composition Red jacket with an upper body made of 100% polyester in black, lower body and long sleeves made of 100% nylon in red, lining made of 100% polyester in red, mock neck, 550 Fill Down made of 75% grey duck down and 25% feathers, soft fleece cuffs extending from sleeve openings, two hand-warmer pockets at the front, zipped internal pocket for your ipod with a cord manager, trims, zipper pulls and cord locks made of recycled waste materials, nike swoosh and manchester united badge embroidered in red on the chest and Manchester United embroidered on the back Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold in a gentle cycle separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Rinse thoroughly and remove immediately Spin or line dry until damp, then tumble dry low separately with a tennis ball to avoid down clumps Do not store stuffed or wet This jacket is one of the warmest options you'll find. Duck down offers maximum natural insulation while not adding too much weight and all of the features are designed to keep the cold air out. Wear this on chilly winter mornings and be the envy of your shivering friends. Model statistics Product is a size M of height 6', chest 39" shoulders 18"
